chunks.text:
ae
- Instagram: @downtownclinicdubai
- Appointments available by phone and online booking

### Operating Hours
Monday to Sunday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

### Target Patients
- Dubai residents and visitors seeking dental care
- Families looking for pediatric and adult dental services
- Individuals interested in cosmetic dentistry and smile makeovers
- Patients needing dental implants, orthodontics, or oral surgery
- People seeking convenient 7-day-a-week dental access in Dubai.

### Dental Services
- General Dentistry: Routine check-ups, cleanings, fillings, and preventive care
- Cosmetic Dentistry: Teeth whitening, veneers, smile makeovers, bonding
- Dental Implants: Single and multiple tooth replacement with implant technology
- Orthodontics: Braces, Invisalign, and teeth alignment treatments
- Root Canal Treatment: Endodontic procedures for infected or damaged teeth
- Crowns & Bridges: Custom dental restorations for damaged or missing teeth
- Pediatric Dentistry: Specialized dental care for children
- Oral Surgery: Tooth extractions, wisdom teeth removal
- Periodontics: Gum disease treatment and prevention
- Prosthodontics: Dentures, partial dentures, and prosthetic dental solutions

### Medical Services
- General medical consultations
- Health check-ups and screenings
- Aesthetic and cosmetic treatments

### Key Differentiators
- Modern, state-of-the-art dental equipment and technology
- Experienced team of dental and medical professionals
- Patient-centered approach with personalized treatment plans
- Comfortable, welcoming clinic environment
- Centrally located in Dubai for easy accessibility
- Comprehensive range of dental services under one roof
- Open 7 days a week for convenience

### Location & Contact
- Location: Dubai, UAE
- Website: https://downtownclinic.

## Downtown Clinic — Dental & Medical Clinic in Dubai
Website: https://downtownclinic. ae

### Clinic Overview
Downtown Clinic is a modern dental and medical clinic located in Dubai, UAE. The clinic provides comprehensive dental care and medical services in a professional, welcoming environment. Known for its patient-centered approach, Downtown Clinic combines advanced dental technology with experienced professionals to deliver high-quality oral healthcare and medical treatments.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are the AI assistant for Downtown Clinic, a modern dental and medical clinic in Dubai.

Key clinic information:
- Clinic: Downtown Clinic
- Location: Dubai, UAE
- Website: https://downtownclinic.ae
- Instagram: @downtownclinicdubai
- Hours: Monday-Sunday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (open 7 days)
- Dental services: General dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, implants, orthodontics (Invisalign/braces), root canal, crowns & bridges, pediatric dentistry, oral surgery, periodontics, prosthodontics
- Medical services: General consultations, health check-ups, aesthetic treatments
- USP: Modern technology, experienced team, patient-centered approach, open 7 days, comprehensive dental care under one roof

Rules:
- Answer questions only based on the knowledge base provided
- Always respond in the user's language
- Be warm, professional, and reassuring about dental and medical treatments
- For appointment booking or pricing, suggest contacting Downtown Clinic via the website https://downtownclinic.ae or Instagram @downtownclinicdubai
- Never make up specific pricing, doctor names, or treatment timelines
- Reassure patients who may be anxious about dental procedures
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Downtown Clinic! We're a modern dental and medical clinic in Dubai, open 7 days a week. From general check-ups and cosmetic dentistry to implants and orthodontics — our experienced team is here to take care of your smile. How can we help you today?
